evals.prompt: Here's the Amazon review page for the Anker portable charger: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B07S829LBX#averageCustomerReviewsAnchor. Can you analyze the customer reviews from the last 6 months? Just the HTML report is fine, no need to save the data.
evals.expected_output: Self-contained interactive HTML dashboard with: executive summary header, interactive time filter, 4 Chart.js charts (avg rating trend, review volume, rating segmentation stacked bar, sentiment trend), complaint themes with verbatim quotes, and prioritized action items.

assertions.name: html-file-exists
assertions.description: An .html file was saved to the outputs directory

assertions.name: html-is-self-contained
assertions.description: The HTML file loads Chart.js from CDN and contains all CSS inline — no missing external resources required to render

assertions.name: html-has-four-charts
assertions.description: HTML contains 4 distinct Chart.js canvas elements (avg rating trend, review volume bar, rating segmentation stacked bar, sentiment trend lines)

assertions.name: html-has-complaint-section
assertions.description: HTML contains a complaints or themes section with at least one verbatim customer quote

assertions.name: html-has-action-items
assertions.description: HTML contains a numbered action items section with priority indicators

assertions.name: html-has-time-filter
assertions.description: HTML includes a month dropdown or date range control that filters the trend charts

evals.prompt: I want a review analysis for the Bose QuietComfort 45 headphones. I don't have a specific URL. Please save the data as a JSON file and also generate slides along with the HTML.
evals.expected_output: Searches for and confirms a review page URL, fetches reviews, generates self-contained interactive HTML dashboard + .pptx slides, saves raw reviews as JSON file.

assertions.name: html-file-exists
assertions.description: An .html file was saved to the outputs directory

assertions.name: pptx-file-exists
assertions.description: A .pptx slides deck file was saved to the outputs directory

assertions.name: json-data-saved
assertions.description: A raw reviews .json file was saved to the outputs directory

assertions.name: html-has-four-charts
assertions.description: HTML contains 4 distinct Chart.js canvas elements

assertions.name: slides-has-multiple-slides
assertions.description: The .pptx file contains at least 5 slides

assertions.name: html-has-complaint-section
assertions.description: HTML contains complaint themes with at least one verbatim customer quote
